info.name: Modular Monolith DDD VSA API
info.description:
## Modular Monolith + DDD + Vertical Slices Boilerplate

Full API suite — 30 endpoints across 6 modules. Bearer JWT auth.

### Auth Flow (run in order):
1. `Captcha > Get Client Key` — get captcha key (auto-saves)
2. `OTP > Send OTP` — send SMS with captcha
3. `Auth > Create Tokens` — verify OTP, get JWT tokens (auto-saves)
4. All other endpoints use auto-injected `{{accessToken}}`

### Postman Features Used:
- **Collection variables** — auto-saved between requests
- **Pre-request scripts** — auto-inject Bearer token
- **Test scripts** — status, response time, schema checks
- **Example responses** — structured success/error samples
- **Bearer auth** — configured at collection level with `{{accessToken}}`

item.name: Captcha
item.description: Captcha endpoints. Obtain client key before sending OTP.

exec: // Extract response fields to collection variables

request.description:
Get captcha client key. Public endpoint — no auth required.

Auto-saves `clientKey` to `{{captchaToken}}`.

response.name: Error Response
Unauthorized Response

item.name: OTP
item.description: Send OTP SMS. Requires captcha token from Captcha step.

request.description:
Send OTP code via SMS to phone number.

**Body:**
- `phoneNumber` — target phone
- `captchaToken` — from Captcha step

Public endpoint.

response.name: Error Response
Unauthorized Response

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication — OTP-based login, token refresh, logout.

exec: // Extract response fields to collection variables

request.description:
Verify OTP code and receive JWT tokens.

**Body:**
- `phoneNumber` — registered phone
- `otp` — OTP code from SMS

Auto-saves `accessToken` and `refreshToken` to collection variables.

response.name: Error Response
Unauthorized Response

exec: // Extract response fields to collection variables

request.description:
Refresh expiring access token.

Auto-saves new `accessToken`.

response.name: Error Response
Unauthorized Response

request.description: Revoke current refresh token. Use to log out. Requires auth.

response.name: Error Response
Unauthorized Response

exec: // Extract response fields to collection variables

request.description:
Register a new user.

**Body:**
- `phoneNumber` — phone that received OTP
- `otp` — OTP from SMS
- `name`, `lastName` — user identity
- `nationalIdentityNumber` — 11-digit TR ID
- `birthDate` — YYYY-MM-DD
- `captchaToken` — from Captcha step

Auto-saves new user ID.

response.name: Error Response
Unauthorized Response
